Cashew: Tea Mosquito Bug (High), Stem and Root Borer (High), Leaf Miner (Medium), Thrips (Medium), Apple Borer (Low)
Banana: Banana Weevil (High), Pseudostem Borer (High), Aphids (Medium), Thrips (Medium), Nematodes (High)
Jackfruit: Shoot Borer (Medium), Bud Weevil (Medium), Mealybug (Low), Aphids (Low), Scale Insects (Low)
Custard Apple: Mealybug (High), Fruit Borer (Medium), Aphids (Low), Scale Insects (Low), Thrips (Low)
Pomegranate: Fruit Borer / Deudorix (High), Thrips (High), Aphids (Medium), Whitefly (Medium), Mealybug (Low)
Amla: Bark Eating Caterpillar (High), Leaf Roller (Medium), Aphids (Low), Scale Insects (Low), Fruit Borer (Low)

Parameter: Nutrient (Mineral) Deficiencies and Their Associated Syndrome
Mango: B: Black tip; Zn: Small leaf; N: Pale leaves
Citrus: Zn: Mottle leaf/small leaves; Fe: Interveinal chlorosis; B: Hard/lumpy fruit; Mg: Bronzing
Guava: Zn: Bronzing/small leaves; N: Pale leaves
Papaya: B: Lumpy fruit/poor pollination; N: Pale leaves; P: Dark green leaves with purpling
Coconut: Mg: Yellowing of older leaflets; B: Barren nuts/cracked leaves; Cl: Drooping leaves
Banana: K: Leaf margin yellowing; Mg: Yellow bands; Zn: Narrow leaves with chlorosis
Jackfruit: N: General yellowing; P: Reduced growth
Pomegranate: B: Fruit cracking; Zn: Small leaves/rosetting; Ca: Blossom end rot
Amla: B: Fruit necrosis; N: Pale leaves
